method: in-app browser (Chromium) loaded rum_harness.html embedding the REAL extracted RUM_JS client; navigator.sendBeacon stubbed to capture payloads; a large <h1> triggers a real LCP; body click gives INP an event; page-hidden flush sends the beacons.

rum_client_test.note: the real client captures live Core Web Vitals and tags each beacon with theme/route/device/network, beaconing to /api/rum on visibilitychange->hidden / pagehide.

conclusion: Acceptance (query by theme/route/device/network) is served by the offline rum_cwv tool (segments p75 by all four dims, verified on synthetic data); the browser proves the client actually collects real CWV tagged with those four dimensions. (无数据不声称达标 is enforced by the tool's min-sample gate.)
